text: To recommend a product, you say: it is the fastest and the best choice.
Today you share good news: we have launched a new product and we have reached our target.

Hi, David. I want to announce some good news. We have reached our sales target.
That is a great result! What else have you achieved this year?
We have launched two new products, and we have reached a big milestone.
Excellent! Have we achieved our main goal for the year?
Yes, we have. This year is a big success, and the team has worked very hard.
Wonderful. We have done it together. I am very proud of the whole team.
I want to announce some good news.
We have launched two new products.
We have done it together, and I am very proud.

Hi, this is David from Sanofi Medley. I have great news for the team. This year we have reached our sales target, and we have launched two new products. We have also signed a big partnership with a new pharmacy chain. Our team has worked very hard, and the results are excellent. Next week, you will share this good news with the customer. Please prepare three sentences with the present perfect. For example, we have grown a lot, and we have achieved our main goal. I am very proud of everyone. Thank you, and congratulations to the whole team.

Hello, my name is Sofia, and I work in marketing. Today I want to share some good news about our year. We have achieved a very important milestone. We have sold more than one million units, and we have reached every sales target. Our company has grown thirty percent, and the results are the best in five years. We have also won a national award for the new product. I am very proud of this success. These are big achievements, and we have done it together as a team. Congratulations to everyone, and thank you for your hard work.

First, Gleice says she has good news to share. Then she announces the main result: the team has reached the sales target. After that, she gives another achievement: they have launched two new products. Next, she shares the milestone: they have signed a big partnership. Finally, she says she is very proud and thanks the team for the success.
